headline: Charles River Labs (CRL) Pulled Back Due to AI Disruption Fears
summary: Madison Small Cap Fund, managed by Madison Funds, released its Q1 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Madison Small Cap Fund (class I) increased by 0.10% in the first quarter, trailing behind the Russell 2000 Index (up 0.89%) and the Russell 2500 Index (up 2.04%). Despite slightly […]
